label: Post-process settlement params
description: Parameters controlling post-generation processing applied to newly placed settlement buildings.

clearBuildingFaction.label: Clear building faction
clearBuildingFaction.description: When true, the faction assignment is cleared from all newly placed buildings.

noFuel.label: No fuel
noFuel.description: When true, fuel is removed from refuelable buildings in the settlement.

ageCorpses.label: Age corpses
ageCorpses.description: When true, corpses in the settlement are given random age to appear pre-existing.

damageBuildings.label: Damage buildings
damageBuildings.description: When true, settlement buildings receive random damage after generation.

canDamageWalls.label: Can damage walls
canDamageWalls.description: When damageBuildings is true, whether walls may also be damaged.
